productDisplayName: Timberland Men Cargo Stratham Hood Blue Jacket
description: CompositionBlue hooded jacket, made of 100% organic cotton body, hood, lining body and pocket, with 100% nylon lining sleeve and hood, and 100% genuine cowhide leather trimming, zippered front with snap buttons on the top, patch pockets on both chest with snap buttons, logo at the back of the neck FittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water Wash dark colours separately Use only non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry normal at low heat Warm iron when needed Dry cleanable This electric blue jacket from timberland will be an excellent addition to your wardrobe, and guarantees double takes from strangers with its smart tailoring and sophisticated style! It is made from specially treated fabrics, ensuring that you don't get drenched in sudden downpours.The incredibly smart jacket is made from breathable fabrics, and channels moisture away from the body to keep you dry and comfortable. Keep this jacket handy, and you will never have to bother about rains!
